# programs.obsidian

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.obsidian`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.obsidian.cli.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the Obsidian CLI in `obsidian.json`. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.app` | `JSON value` | Settings to write to `app.json`. Vault-specific settings take priority and will override these, if set. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.appearance` | `JSON value` | Settings to write to `appearance.json`. Vault-specific settings take priority and will override these, if set. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.communityPlugins` | `null or (list of ((submodule) or package convertible to it))` | Community plugins to install and activate. Vault-specific settings take priority and will override these, if set. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.communityPlugins.*.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the plugin. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.communityPlugins.*.pkg` | `package` | The plugin package. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.communityPlugins.*.settings` | `JSON value` | Settings to include in the plugin's `data.json`. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.corePlugins` | `null or (list of ((submodule) or (one of "audio-recorder", "backlink", "bases", "bookmarks", "canvas", "command-palette", "daily-notes", "editor-status", "file-explorer", "file-recovery", "footnotes", "global-search", "graph", "markdown-importer", "note-composer", "outgoing-link", "outline", "page-preview", "properties", "publish", "random-note", "slash-command", "slides", "switcher", "sync", "tag-pane", "templates", "webviewer", "word-count", "workspaces", "zk-prefixer") convertible to it))` | Core plugins to activate. Vault-specific settings take priority and will override these, if set. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.corePlugins.*.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the plugin. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.corePlugins.*.name` | `one of "audio-recorder", "backlink", "bases", "bookmarks", "canvas", "command-palette", "daily-notes", "editor-status", "file-explorer", "file-recovery", "footnotes", "global-search", "graph", "markdown-importer", "note-composer", "outgoing-link", "outline", "page-preview", "properties", "publish", "random-note", "slash-command", "slides", "switcher", "sync", "tag-pane", "templates", "webviewer", "word-count", "workspaces", "zk-prefixer"` | The plugin. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.corePlugins.*.settings` | `JSON value` | Plugin settings to include. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.cssSnippets` | `null or (list of ((submodule) or absolute path convertible to it))` | CSS snippets to install. Vault-specific settings take priority and will override these, if set. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.cssSnippets.*.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the snippet. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.cssSnippets.*.name` | `string` | Name of the snippet. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.cssSnippets.*.source` | `null or absolute path` | Path of the source file. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.cssSnippets.*.text` | `null or string` | Text of the file. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.extraFiles` | `null or (attribute set of (submodule))` | Extra files to link to the vault directory. Vault-specific settings take priority and will override these, if set. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.extraFiles.<name>.source` | `null or absolute path` | Path of the source file or directory. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.extraFiles.<name>.target` | `string` | Path to target relative to the vault's directory. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.extraFiles.<name>.text` | `null or string` | Text of the file. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.hotkeys` | `null or (attribute set of list of (submodule))` | Hotkeys to configure. Vault-specific settings take priority and will override these, if set. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.hotkeys.<name>.*.key` | `string` | The hotkey. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.hotkeys.<name>.*.modifiers` | `list of string` | The hotkey modifiers. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.themes` | `null or (list of ((submodule) or package convertible to it))` | Themes to install. Vault-specific settings take priority and will override these, if set. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.themes.*.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to set the theme as active. |
| `programs.obsidian.defaultSettings.themes.*.pkg` | `package` | The theme package. |
| `programs.obsidian.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable obsidian. |
| `programs.obsidian.package` | `null or package` | The obsidian package to use. |
| `programs.obsidian.vaults` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | List of vaults to create. |
| `programs.obsidian.vaults.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether this vault should be generated. |
| `programs.obsidian.vaults.<name>.settings.app` | `JSON value` | Settings to write to app.json. |
